asset_name: Duel Hall Stage Frame — academy hall shell and podiums
shared_properties: The duel arena keeps a single-screen 1920x1080 composition under a fixed orthographic camera.
Warm maroon architecture, gold trim, and cool spell glow anchors define the academy identity.
Character podium zones stay readable and leave a clear projectile lane through the center band.
differences: This task covers the static room shell, floor, curtains, pillars, and podium bases.
Interactive lane cues, telegraph overlays, and HUD panels stay in later tasks.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Moodboard for the academy hall palette, lighting contrast, and magical ambience.

reference_images.label: reflect_academy_player_silhouette
reference_images.purpose: Player silhouette board for scaling the two podium zones against a readable combatant footprint.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_2/world_duel_hall_stage_frame.png during DuelLoading and keep the handle in a typed art manifest keyed by world_duel_hall_stage_frame.
runtime_notes: Anchor the backdrop at screen center x=960 y=540 and keep parallax disabled for deterministic lane alignment.
Reserve unobstructed negative space through x=740..1260 and y=360..700 for projectile travel.
Keep podium tops aligned to the player and enemy combat roots so battle sheets can swap without shifting the arena shell.

context.usage: Full-screen duel hall background used in every combat round and reward transition.

layout_notes: Enemy podium center sits near x=340 y=265 and player podium center sits near x=340 y=770.
Top-right HUD reserve stays open inside x=1320..1880 and y=32..182.
Bottom card-hand reserve stays open inside x=240..1680 and y=900..1060.

shape.silhouette: Wide academy chamber with arch windows, banner pillars, duel floor, and two raised podium bases.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 1920x1080px and the arena shell fills the frame without letterboxing.
Player and enemy podium tops align to the documented combat roots without overlapping the center lane reserve.
Gold trim, maroon stone, and cool accent glows remain readable after UI overlay and projectile effects are layered on top.
No projectile-path obstruction appears inside the reserved center band.
